key.name: currency-pair
key.description: The currency pair that will be displayed in the panel

key.name: show-percentage-change
key.description: Whether to show the percentage change in the panel

key.name: show-icon
key.description: Whether to show the currency icon in the panel

key.name: enable-notifications
key.description: Show notifications when currency reaches threshold

key.name: notification-type
key.description: Trigger when rate goes above or below threshold

key.name: decimal-places
key.description: Number of decimal places to display (2-4)

key.name: show-pair-label
key.description: Show the currency pair name (e.g. GBP/TRY) before the rate in the panel

key.name: show-sparkline
key.description: Display 24-hour price trend sparkline in popup menu

key.name: custom-coin-id
key.description: CoinGecko coin ID for custom cryptocurrency (e.g. 'dogecoin', 'solana'). Leave empty to disable.

key.name: custom-coin-symbol
key.description: Display symbol shown in the panel and menu (e.g. 'DOGE', 'SOL').

key.name: custom-coin-vs-currency
key.description: Quote currency for the custom coin price (usd, eur, try, gbp).
